_publications._publicationTitle: Use of machine learning to predict cognitive performance based on brain metabolism in Neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: The NF1 group had a significantly inferior performance compared to controls in intelligence (full scale IQ) and verbal short-term memory (i.e., Digit Span forward) tests.
details: Forward digit span showed significant impairment in NF1 group (28.38 ± 12.50 vs 56.81 ± 27.26, p=0.001, d=1.39), while backward digit span showed no difference (18.81 ± 10.09 vs 18.75 ± 11.54, d=-0.01)
